title: Services Schema
description: Provider-scoped postal add-on services. Each row has unified Porto `porto_id` (SDK input), provider `id` (native catalog key for graph/prices/rules), native `name`, and English `label`.

provider.description: Provider identifier (e.g. deutschepost, ukrposhta, laposte, swisspost)

id.description: Provider-scoped service id in this catalog (may match operator naming; referenced from provider-specific tooling)

porto_id.description: Unified Porto service id for SDK input and cross-operator resolution. graph.json and prices.service_id use native `id`, not `porto_id`.

label.description: English human-readable label for unified tooling and docs

features.description: Feature references: each entry may be provider feature `id` or unified `porto_id` (see features.json)

source_id.description: Deutsche Post PPL service identifier (note: services in PPL are typically composite products, not standalone IDs)

online_supported.description: Whether this service can be ordered via online provider flows (e.g. Internetmarke, WebStamp). Default: true if omitted. Set false for discontinued or offline-only services.

integrations.description: Per-integration support: { "internetmarke": true, "webstamp": false }. Only list integrations with explicit evidence of support.

supported_zones.description: Zone IDs where this service is orderable via API. When omitted, service is available for all zones the product supports. Used for API restrictions (e.g. Einschreiben Einwurf/Rückschein only domestic via Internetmarke).

combinable_with.description: Service IDs this service can be combined with in a single order.

enables_tracking.description: When true, ordering this service activates tracking on the execution result (product tracking_mode must be optional or included).
